examples:
Check if exact position is empty:
<sqf>_position = _center findEmptyPosition [0, 0, "B_Boat_Armed_01_minigun_F"];</sqf>
name: findEmptyPosition

Item.desc: search area center position in format [x,y] or [x,y,z] in which case z is ignored
Item.name: center

ret.desc: a suitable empty position or empty array <sqf inline>[]</sqf> if not found

Item.desc: stop searching no further than {{hl|areaRadius + maxDistance}} from the center
Item.name: maxDistance

Item.desc: classname of a vehicle to accommodate
Item.name: vehicleType
